name: Hoomaluhia Botanical Garden
tagline: 400 acres of lush gardens backed by the Koolau cliffs — free admission and the most photogenic spot on Oahu.
parking: Free parking at visitor center and multiple lots throughout the garden
hours: Daily 9am–4pm. Closed Christmas & New Year's Day
bestTime: Early morning for misty mountain views and cooler temps; weekdays to avoid weekend crowds
talkStory: Great for all ages. Drive through the garden and stop at various sections — kids love the lake area for catch-and-release fishing (free poles available on weekends). The wide paved paths are stroller-friendly. Bring mosquito repellent, snacks, and rain jackets — it's Windward side so expect passing showers. The iconic Koolau mountain backdrop from the entrance road is the most Instagrammed spot on Oahu.
